scripts.vector:clean: wrangler vectorize delete flare-gpt-vectors --force && wrangler vectorize create flare-gpt-vectors --dimensions=384 --metric=cosine && wrangler vectorize create-metadata-index flare-gpt-vectors --property-name=userId --type=string && wrangler vectorize create-metadata-index flare-gpt-vectors --property-name=chatId --type=string
